subject: fix(quality): resolve all ESLint errors, add realtime, deduplicate code
body:
Comprehensive codebase review and hardening pass that resolves all 13
ESLint errors and fixes several architectural issues.

Critical fixes:
- Remove conditional useCallback in ModuleEditorPage (Rules of Hooks)
- Fix react-hooks/set-state-in-effect across all data hooks by merging
  initial fetch into Supabase channel subscribe('SUBSCRIBED') callback
- Fix react-refresh/only-export-components by splitting AuthContext
- Fix PWA timer leak via ref-based interval tracking with cleanup

Realtime additions:
- useNotes, useSignatureLog, usePdfVerifications now have realtime
  subscriptions (were fetch-only, counterparty wouldn't see live updates)

Code deduplication:
- Extract TitleDescriptionForm shared by Create/Request agreement forms
- Refactor InstallInstructionsModal to use shared Modal component
- Remove redundant internal state from Toast component

Tags: refactor, quality, realtime, pwa, lint
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: polish-hardening
Semver: patch
